name: Grow a Garden
desc: A relaxed farming and trading sim where you plant, grow, and sell increasingly rare crops with friends.

name: Blox Fruits
desc: An anime-inspired action RPG built around collecting powers from Devil Fruits and battling across a huge open sea.

name: Adopt Me!
desc: A pet-collecting and house-building social sim where you hatch, raise, and trade a huge range of virtual pets.

name: Brookhaven RP
desc: An open-ended roleplay town where players pick jobs, homes, and vehicles to live out everyday storylines.

name: Doors
desc: A tense survival horror crawl through an endless hotel of rooms, each hiding a different creature to outlast.

name: Pet Simulator 99
desc: A grind-heavy idle collector where hatching eggs and stacking pets is the whole loop, PVP included.

name: Bee Swarm Simulator
desc: A cooperative bee-collecting sim with a surprisingly deep progression system across many themed fields.

name: Tower of Hell
desc: A brutally random obstacle tower that regenerates each round, rewarding fast reflexes over memorization.

name: Murder Mystery 2
desc: A classic hidden-role game where one murderer, one sheriff, and a group of innocents figure each other out.

name: Jailbreak
desc: A cops-and-robbers sandbox with heists, prison breaks, and a full vehicle economy to work toward.

name: Arsenal
desc: A fast, arcadey gun game that rotates weapons every kill across a large rotation of community maps.

name: Blade Ball
desc: A reflex-based deflection game where timing a parry against a fast-moving ball decides every round.

name: Fisch
desc: An atmospheric fishing sim spanning open water regions, rare catches, and a slow gear progression curve.

name: Rivals

name: Da Hood

name: Anime Vanguards

name: Steal a Brainrot

name: Natural Disaster Survival

name: Livetopia

name: Islands (Skyblock)

name: Pressure
